title: Fix grep streaming for large files consistency
description: grepStream is implemented with readStream fallback but only triggered for single non-recursive file; depends on optional fs.readStream interface. PRD gap: 'grep streaming for large files (DBB-boundary-004) — implemented but inconsistent'. Ensure streaming grep works reliably across file-based grep paths and integrates with -i, -l, -c flags. Add test for grep on large simulated file using streaming path. Acceptance: grep on large files uses streaming path, -i/-l/-c flags work with streaming, test passes.
